Common cleanups required: (1) merge duplicates across ports, (2) fill markup_pct, lead_time_hours, contact, last_verified, (3) pick a single authoritative port slug when a supplier serves multiple ports, (4) discard false positives from tip cells.

proposed_entries.tip: Soy sauce, rice vinegar, nori — stock up if heading further east

proposed_entries.name: Macro Center
proposed_entries.tip: Carries imported and local goods.

proposed_entries.name: Kadıköy fish market
proposed_entries.tip: Bosphorus fish: turbot, sea bass, bluefish. Arrive early.

proposed_entries.name: Karaköy fish market
proposed_entries.tip: Bosphorus fish: turbot, sea bass, bluefish. Arrive early.

proposed_entries.name: Kadıköy market
proposed_entries.tip: Good quality local lamb and beef

proposed_entries.name: Any bakery
proposed_entries.tip: Istanbul bakeries are exceptional. Simit, pide, village bread.

proposed_entries.name: Kadıköy market
proposed_entries.tip: Excellent local produce. Pomegranates, figs, peppers, tomatoes in season.

proposed_entries.name: Spice Bazaar
proposed_entries.tip: Spices in bulk at a fraction of European prices

proposed_entries.name: Kadıköy
proposed_entries.tip: Spices in bulk at a fraction of European prices

proposed_entries.name: Kadıköy
proposed_entries.tip: This IS the ethnic market. Sumac, Urfa pepper, pomegranate molasses, za'atar at source.

proposed_entries.name: Spice Bazaar
proposed_entries.tip: This IS the ethnic market. Sumac, Urfa pepper, pomegranate molasses, za'atar at source.

proposed_entries.name: Coordinate with your marina agent
proposed_entries.tip: Marina infrastructure varies. Agent for delivery logistics only.
